settings.title: Settings
settings.toolsDesc: Manage tool call approval and whitelist

generalView.title: General Settings
generalView.autoStartDesc: Automatically run the app on system startup
generalView.minimizeToTrayDesc: Minimize to system tray when clicking close
generalView.reviewReminderDesc: Show desktop notifications when cards are due
generalView.languageDesc: Select the display language for the app
generalView.logDirDesc: Set the storage location for log files
generalView.logLevelDesc: Select the verbosity of logged records
generalView.logRotationDesc: Automatically split log files by date when enabled
generalView.maxLogFilesDesc: Set the number of historical log files to keep (0 means unlimited)

appearanceView.title: Appearance & Scenery
appearanceView.titleDesc: Customize app appearance and scenery backgrounds
appearanceView.themeSwitchDesc: Use the day/night mode button in the bottom left to switch themes. Follow system settings coming soon.
appearanceView.scenerySourcePlaceholder: e.g.: [Song] Su Shi 'Memories of the Past'
appearanceView.sceneryStartPageDesc: Scenery in today's completed cards (classic mode)
appearanceView.sceneryNotesPageDesc: Configure scenery background for notes page
appearanceView.sceneryScrollPageDesc: Configure scenery background for scroll page
appearanceView.sceneryFilesPageDesc: Configure scenery background for files page
appearanceView.sceneryExtensionsPageDesc: Configure scenery background for extensions page
appearanceView.sceneryChartsPageDesc: Configure scenery background for charts page
appearanceView.customSceneryTip: Supports web image URLs or local image paths

chatView.title: Chat Settings
chatView.titleDesc: Configure AI chat, providers and model parameters
chatView.agentModeDesc: Enable tool calling, AI can manipulate cards and notes
chatView.showTimestampDesc: Display send time next to messages
chatView.autoScrollDesc: Automatically scroll to bottom when new messages arrive
chatView.enterToSendDesc: Press Enter to send message, Shift+Enter for newline
chatView.userIdDesc: Text displayed on chat avatar (max 10 characters)
chatView.avatarTip: Supports JPG, PNG, GIF format, max 2MB
chatView.addModelTip: Please enable at least one provider first
chatView.completionConfirmDesc: When enabled, press Tab to trigger completion, Enter to confirm; when disabled, input automatically shows completion, Tab to accept directly
chatView.completionDelayDesc: Debounce delay in real-time preview mode (ms)
chatView.noProviderSelected: Please enable at least one provider
chatView.providerNotFound: Selected provider not found, please refresh and try again
chatView.modelAlreadyExists: This model already exists in current provider
chatView.syncFailed: Failed to sync model configuration to backend
chatView.formValidationFailed: Model form validation failed, please check input
chatView.noModelsYet: No models yet, click 'Add Model' button in the top right to add
chatView.noEnabledProviders: No enabled providers, please enable providers first then add models
chatView.writeNotAllowed: Write operations are not allowed in whitelist

toolView.title: Tool Settings
toolView.titleDesc: Manage tool call approval and whitelist
toolView.approvalModeDesc: Auto mode: all tools auto-execute; Manual mode: only whitelist tools auto-execute
toolView.whitelist: Whitelist Tools (Switch ON = auto-execute, no approval needed)
toolView.cliInfo: Papyrus Desktop installs the CLI on demand so AI, Skills, and plugins can call the official entry points.
toolView.cliStatusDesc: Shows whether the CLI in the local tools directory is available
toolView.cliPathDesc: Executable path recorded in the CLI Manager manifest

shortcutsView.title: Shortcuts
shortcutsView.titleDesc: Customize keyboard shortcuts to improve efficiency
shortcutsView.editorTip: Editor shortcuts take effect in text editing area
shortcutsView.studyTip: Study mode shortcuts only take effect in flashcard study interface
shortcutsView.resetShortcutsDesc: Restore all shortcuts to default settings
shortcutsView.pressShortcut: Press desired shortcut combination, or enter manually
shortcutsView.shortcutHint: Hint: Press shortcut combination in input box to auto-recognize
shortcutsView.confirmResetMessage: Are you sure you want to reset all shortcuts to default values?
shortcutsView.studyModeEditing: Study mode shortcut editing feature under development

accessibilityView.title: Accessibility Settings
accessibilityView.titleDesc: Papyrus Desktop is committed to providing an inclusive user experience. Full app supports WCAG 2.1 AA level standard, partial features support AAA level enhancement.
accessibilityView.aaLevelDesc: These settings comply with WCAG 2.1 AA level standard, recommended to keep enabled for all users.
accessibilityView.aaaLevelDesc: These settings comply with WCAG 2.1 AAA level standard, suitable for users with special needs.
accessibilityView.focusIndicatorDesc: Always show clear keyboard focus highlight for easy keyboard navigation
accessibilityView.focusIndicatorTip: Highlight currently focused element when navigating with Tab key
accessibilityView.screenReaderDesc: Optimize interface elements for better screen reader experience
accessibilityView.screenReaderTip: Enhanced ARIA labels, hide decorative elements
accessibilityView.largeCursorDesc: Enlarge mouse pointer for users with visual impairments
accessibilityView.highContrastDesc: Enhance text and background contrast to 7:1 (small text) and 4.5:1 (large text)
accessibilityView.highContrastTip: Significantly improve text readability, suitable for users with low vision
accessibilityView.readingEnhancementDesc: 1.5x line height, 2x paragraph spacing, text width limit ≤80 characters, no justified alignment
accessibilityView.readingEnhancementTip: Optimize reading experience, suitable for users with reading difficulties
accessibilityView.sectionNavDesc: Display page content outline for quick navigation
accessibilityView.sectionNavTip: Display clickable section title list on the right side of the page
accessibilityView.noAnimationDesc: Disable all interface animations, including transitions and scroll animations
accessibilityView.noAnimationTip: Suitable for users with vestibular disorders or epilepsy
accessibilityView.systemPrefersDesc: When system is set to 'reduce motion', Papyrus Desktop will automatically reduce animation effects. You can further disable all animations here.
accessibilityView.fontSizeLinkDesc: For font size adjustment, please go to 'Appearance & Scenery' settings. System-level text scaling is also fully supported.

dataView.title: Data Settings
dataView.titleDesc: Manage data backup, recovery and storage
dataView.createBackupDesc: Backup all data to local file immediately
dataView.exportDataDesc: Export as JSON or Markdown files
dataView.importObsidianDesc: Import Markdown files from Obsidian Vault
dataView.resetAllDesc: Permanently delete all data, cannot be recovered
dataView.backupTip: It is recommended to back up data regularly to prevent accidental loss
dataView.localStorageDesc: Store data using local file system
dataView.importDesc: Please enter the full path of Obsidian Vault, system will import Markdown files from it.
dataView.confirmResetMessage: Are you sure you want to reset all data? This action cannot be undone!

aboutView.title: About
aboutView.description: SRS Review Engine - Intelligent memory card app based on spaced repetition algorithm
aboutView.latestVersion: You are using the latest version
aboutView.acknowledgementsDesc: Thank you for using Papyrus Desktop! This app uses the following open source projects:
aboutView.licenseDesc: Papyrus Desktop is open source under MIT license. You are free to use, modify and distribute this software.
aboutView.starTip: If you like this project, please give us a Star on GitHub ⭐

startPage.title: Start
startPage.cardsDue: You have {{count}} cards due for review
startPage.streakProgress: {{streakDays}} days streak | {{todayProgress}}% of today's goal completed
startPage.keepGoing: Keep it up, see you tomorrow.

titleBar.exitConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to exit Papyrus Desktop? Unsaved changes will be lost.
titleBar.enterImportContent: Please enter the content to import
titleBar.importFormat: Format: Question === Answer, one per line
titleBar.importPlaceholder:
e.g.:
Question A === Answer A
Question B === Answer B
titleBar.userIdTip: Will be displayed as avatar text (max 10 characters)

app.pageNotFound: Page '{{page}}' not found in page order list

scrollPage.title: Scrolls
scrollPage.pleaseSelectAtLeastOneCard: Please select at least one card
scrollPage.selectCardsPlaceholder: Please select cards to add to collection
scrollPage.confirmDeleteCollectionMessage: Are you sure you want to delete collection '{{name}}'? Cards will not be deleted, only the tag will be removed.
scrollPage.confirmBatchDelete: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} selected cards? This action cannot be undone.
scrollPage.fetchStatsFailed: Failed to get stats, please try again later
